facts: 81 sites × 20 ecoclimatic Domains; standardized 30-year longitudinal design; ~10 years collected.
hypotheses: Cross-Domain hold-out is a concept shift (categorically different ecosystems) rather than a covariate shift (same ecology, different climate).
Standardization does not fully eliminate measurement-as-confounder; site-specific factors leak.
intuitions: NEON cross-Domain analyses; FLUXNET-NEON comparisons; foundation-ecology-model 2024-25.
unknowns: 'Domain' as primitive — curatorial classification, not natural partition.
Live-collection with non-uniform site-start makes year-as-env non-coherent.
